tagline: Owner-operated house painting in west Sonoma County
seoDescription: Glenn Salkeld Painting — an owner-operated, licensed painting and decorating contractor based in Graton/Sebastopol, CA, serving west Sonoma County. Careful prep, color guidance and clean residential interior and exterior painting. CSLB #699134.
heroHeading: Licensed house painting in west Sonoma County
heroSubheading: Glenn Salkeld Painting is an owner-operated, licensed painting and decorating contractor serving Sebastopol, Graton and west Sonoma County — thorough prep, helpful color guidance and clean, careful work.
highlights: Serving Sebastopol, Graton & west Sonoma County
Known for meticulous prep and daily cleanup
aboutBody: Glenn Salkeld Painting is an owner-operated painting business based in Graton and serving Sebastopol and west Sonoma County. Glenn handles jobs personally, helping homeowners choose colors and finishes and treating each house with the kind of care that comes from doing the work himself.

Customers single out the thorough preparation — sanding and sealing every gap, crack and flaw before a brush touches the wall — along with daily cleanup and fair pricing. The business is a licensed California Painting and Decorating (C-33) contractor, license #699134.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Clean, careful interior painting with meticulous prep and daily cleanup so your home stays livable.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Exterior repaints with thorough sanding, sealing and surface prep to protect the home and last.

services.title: Color Consultation
services.description: Hands-on help choosing colors and finishes from an owner who guides you through the options.

services.title: Surface Prep & Repair
services.description: Sanding and sealing gaps, cracks and flaws so the finished coat goes on right.

testimonials.quote: Great color suggestions and fantastic prep — sanding and sealing every gap, crack and flaw, with daily cleanup and fair pricing.
testimonials.author: Verified BuildZoom review · Sebastopol

notes: Verified via web research. CSLB license #699134 (Painting & Decorating, C-33) issued 11/16/1994, owner Glenn Ross Salkeld, Graton — confirmed ACTIVE via BuildZoom (BuildZoom score 93) and corroborated across search snippets that cite CSLB data; could not load cslb.ca.gov detail page directly (form-based). $15,000 bond with American Contractors Indemnity. Website status: NONE — no own site on Yelp, BuildZoom, Manta or elsewhere; directory listings only. Trust signal = verified active CSLB license #699134 (license tenure since 1994; 'established' left empty because the BUSINESS founding year is not separately documented). Addresses: 9656 O'Connell Rd, Sebastopol 95472 (Yelp) and 321 Grey St, Graton 95444 (CSLB/BuildZoom of record); (707) 829-5783. Reviews are few (an older 5-star BuildZoom review), so trust signal leans on the active license, not review volume. Hours not verified → []. Photo-less build. Testimonial condensed honestly from a real BuildZoom review.
